stemHtml: A pilot requires a detailed description of a holding procedure. In which order should ATC provide this information?

options.a: Fix, inbound track, right or left turns, level, time of leg (if necessary).
options.b: Fix, level, inbound track, right or left turns, time of leg (if necessary).
options.c: Fix, level, right or left turns, level, inbound track, time of leg (if necessary).
options.d: Fix, inbound track, level, right or left turns, time of leg (if necessary).
